en: What's led you here?
Mm-hmm.
Of course, it's about a million miles from where I started out in college.
ko: 물론, 대학에서 시작한 곳과는 백만 마일이나 떨어져 있어요.

en: You weren't, uh, in broadcasting or journalism?
Mm-mm.
Believe it or not, I studied 19th century French poetry.
What a waste of time.
I mean, for someone else, that would be an incredible waste of time.
ko: 다른 사람에게는 정말 큰 시간 낭비일 거예요.

en: So bold of you to choose that.
It's incredible. You must be a very, very strong person.
ko: 정말 놀라워요. 당신은 매우 강한 사람일 거예요.

en: I think people place too much emphasis on their careers.
ko: 사람들은 자신의 경력에 너무 많은 비중을 두는 것 같아요.

en: Gosh, I wish we could all live in the mountains.
ko: 아, 우리 모두 산에서 살 수 있었으면 좋겠어요.

en: At high altitudes.
That's where I see myself in five years.
How about you?
Oh, I agree. I'd just like to go with the flow.
ko: 아, 저도 동의해요. 그냥 흐름에 맡기고 싶어요.

en: Yeah? See what happens.
Well, it's gotten you here. Uh-huh.
ko: 그게 당신을 여기까지 오게 했네요. 음-hmm.

en: Of course, it's a million miles from where I started out in college.
ko: 물론, 대학에서 시작한 곳과는 백만 마일이나 떨어져 있어요.

en: Oh, yeah? You weren't in broadcasting or journalism, anything like that?
ko: 아, 그래요? 방송이나 저널리즘 같은 건 아니었나요?

en: Uh-uh.
Believe it or not, I studied 19th century French poetry.
